etsy.name: Etsy
etsy.description: £0.16 listing + 6.5% transaction + 4% + £0.20 payment processing. Off-site ads 15% if under $10k/year revenue.
etsy.notes: Etsy charges in USD for listing fees. £0.16 is approximate GBP equivalent of $0.20.

ebay.name: eBay
ebay.description: 12.8% + £0.30 per sale (includes payment processing). 1,000 free listings/month.
ebay.notes: Final value fee varies by category (10-14.6%). 12.8% is the most common rate.

vinted.name: Vinted
vinted.description: No seller fees. Buyers pay 5% + £0.70 protection fee. Seller receives full listing price.
vinted.notes: Vinted is free for sellers — buyer pays all fees. Seller take-home = listing price minus postage if seller pays.

amazon.name: Amazon
amazon.notes: Referral fee varies by category (8-45%). 15% is the most common. FBA adds storage + fulfilment fees.

depop.name: Depop
depop.description: No seller fees since 2024. Depop removed the 10% selling fee.
depop.notes: Previously 10% + payment processing. Now free for sellers. Buyers pay a fee instead.

tiktokShop.name: TikTok Shop
tiktokShop.description: 5% referral fee per sale. No listing fees.
tiktokShop.notes: Introductory rate. May increase. Commission varies by category.

shopify.name: Shopify (own store)
shopify.notes: No per-item commission. Monthly cost is fixed regardless of sales volume.

facebookMarketplace.name: Facebook Marketplace
facebookMarketplace.description: Free for local pickup sales. 5% + £0.40 for shipped items (via checkout).
facebookMarketplace.notes: Most FB Marketplace sales are local pickup with no fees.

noFees.name: No platform / direct sales
noFees.description: Selling directly (craft fairs, local, website without platform fees).
noFees.notes: May still have payment processing costs (PayPal, Stripe, Square).
